notes: What's Changed · * Reflect Teddy Chan as active maintainer; keep Jordan Baird credit by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/10 · * macOS 26/27 (arm64) cleanup: lock-free PID lookup, drop migrations, fix capture API by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/11 · * Fix release CI: pin dragon-release-ci to @v2 for swiftpm_runner by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/12
What's Changed · * Show hidden items on hover over the Ice 2 icon (v2.5.3) by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/9
What's Changed · * Release 2.5.2: latest Node.js CI runtime + lint cleanup by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/8

What's Changed · * Fix Sparkle update detection: bump build number + grant release workflow contents:write by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/5 · * Drop Intel support: Apple Silicon only, bump to 2.5.0 by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/6 · * Release 2.5.1: enable always-hidden section by default by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/7

What's Changed · * Fix review issues in 2.1.0 menu bar work (supersedes #1) by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/2 · * [codex] Add remaining 2.1.0 issue fixes by @teddychan in https://github.com/teddychan/ice-2/pull/1 · New Contributors
Ice 2 v2.0.1 renames the app and user-facing content from Ice to Ice 2, updates the app bundle name to Ice 2.app, and bumps the app version to 2.0.1 (build 1122).
